overall.description: First-person exploration of a grand gothic library interior with towering wooden bookshelves, ornate architecture, and atmospheric lighting. The player walks through various sections including a main hall, narrow corridors, a fireplace area with an NPC, and an exhibit hall with display cases.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand gothic library hall with towering wooden bookshelves and warm chandelier lighting. The camera walks forward then turns left, revealing reading benches with green lamps and an ornate iron gate on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow bookshelf corridor with wooden ladders

events.description: moving from the open grand hall into a narrow corridor lined with bookshelves on both sides

wooden rolling ladder leaning against the bookshelves
tight corridor with bookshelves on both sides creating an enclosed feeling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor flanked by towering bookshelves on both sides. A large tapestry hangs on the left wall and wooden ladders lean against the shelves. The space feels more intimate and confined compared to the grand hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: reading nook with fireplace and armchairs

turning right to move past the NPC toward the window area

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a cozy reading nook featuring a large stone fireplace with burning flames. A robed NPC stands near the fire, and green armchairs are arranged around the hearth on an ornate rug. The camera slows to observe the area before turning right.

ornate wooden railing along the gallery edge

segments.scene_description: Moving past the fireplace area, the scene transitions to an upper gallery with large arched windows on the right overlooking the grand main hall below. The wooden balcony railing features ornate carvings, and the space feels elevated and open to the larger structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: exhibit corridor with framed paintings and artifact displays

tall wooden display cases containing artifacts and books
large freestanding display case containing an architectural map or diagram

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a museum-like corridor with framed portraits lining the wood-paneled walls and display cases containing artifacts. The camera approaches a large display case at the end containing what appears to be an architectural map or diagram, surrounded by bookshelves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic library that transitions from an expansive hall into a confined corridor and finally into a cozy, intimate reading nook. It begins in a vast hall illuminated by warm chandeliers, moving past towering wooden bookshelves before turning left toward reading benches with green lamps and an ornate iron gate. As the camera advances, the space narrows into an enclosed corridor flanked by high shelves and wooden ladders, with a large tapestry hanging along the left wall. The scene then opens into a warm hearth area featuring a large stone fireplace with burning flames and green armchairs arranged on an ornate rug. Finally, the camera slows to observe a robed NPC standing by the fire before turning right to exit the nook.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, elevated gallery overlooking a grand hall into a secluded, museum-like corridor. It begins by moving past a fireplace area and ascending toward an upper gallery, where large arched windows on the right cast light over the expansive main hall below. As the camera glides along the ornate carvings of the wooden balcony railing, the open atmosphere of the hall gradually gives way to a more enclosed space. The scene then shifts into a wood-paneled corridor lined with framed portraits and artifact display cases, narrowing the field of view. Finally, the movement leads toward a large display case at the end of the hall containing an architectural map, nestled among towering bookshelves.
